minimum.cpu: Intel Core i5 2400 @ 3.1 GHz or AMD FX 6350 @ 3.9 GHz
minimum.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 670 (2GB) or AMD Radeon R9 270X (2GB) or better

recommended.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 (4GB) or AMD Radeon R9 290X (4GB) or better
